channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flyposting, 7th May
item.description:
Flyers emerging on boarded up Swan pub encourages more asb and flyposters and graffiti
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Lion Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown shrubs/bushes/trees, 7th May
item.description:
Overgrown trees, shrubs and bushes encouraging flytipping and litter very scruffy area both sides of Lion Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Lion Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping and rubbish, 7th May
item.description:
Flytipping and general litter on both sides of Red Lion Close in shrubbery and bushes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Lion Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal and dangerous power and water hoses on footway, 7th May
item.description:
At least twice a week, for many months, the pavement is blocked with these dangerous obstructions, usually late in the evening and for several hours at a time.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandringham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hodge House NW6, 7th May
item.description:
Litter needs Sweeping in the Corner of Hodge House NW6

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Across from Orwell House 1-53 NW6, 7th May
item.description:
Bins Need Emptying and Black Bin Liner and Litter needs Sweeping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to 153 Granville Road Entrance Door NW6, 7th May
item.description:
Furniture and Draws STILL WAITING to be Removed from this entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 7th May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cleanthus Close, Plumstead

item.title: Several large branches at base of tree at 24 Westmoreland, 7th May
item.description:
Can this tree be checked and loose branches at base be removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westmoreland Road, Shortlands, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Road, Slade Green, Greater London

item.title: Can this tree be inspected and pruned if necessary?, 7th May
item.description:
Tree branches need to be tidied up please? Pruning would be useful

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Farm Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Can this tree pit be noted to be planted in next season?, 7th May
item.description:
Is this tree pit going to be planted?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Beadon Road, Hayes, Greater London

item.title: Please inspect the paving at 30 Beadon, 7th May
item.description:
Paving is cracked and a trip hazard - can this be inspected?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Beadon Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Animal carcass, 7th May
item.description:
The carcass of a fox has been left double-bagged in a bin for retrieval

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wordsworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tags on Hoardings, 7th May
item.description:
Tags on Hoardings Location: 51.454988021716986, -0.11897417421362162
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Josephine Avenue, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost light not working, 7th May
item.description:
Lamppost light has been not been working for over 3 weeks, it’s been reported once and still has not been fixed despite a notification to say a contractor had been sent. The road is incredibly dark at night making access dangerous when on foot.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Whitehaven Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
